'''âl-v-m-d''' ('''kalavmedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macromanage|macromanage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macromanage|macromanage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-v-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| kalavmedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavmedoko|thilavmedoko]] || [[word:jilavmedoko|jilavmedoko]] || [[word:shilavmedoko|shilavmedoko]] || [[word:kilavmedoko|kilavmedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulavmedoko|thuthulavmedoko]] || [[word:jujulavmedoko|jujulavmedoko]] || [[word:shushulavmedoko|shushulavmedoko]] || [[word:kukulavmedoko|kukulavmedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulavmedoko|thulavmedoko]] || [[word:julavmedoko|julavmedoko]] || [[word:shulavmedoko|shulavmedoko]] || [[word:kulavmedoko|kulavmedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulavmedoko|thulavmedoko]] || [[word:julavmedoko|julavmedoko]] || [[word:shulavmedoko|shulavmedoko]] || [[word:kulavmedoko|kulavmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelavmedoko|thelavmedoko]] || [[word:jelavmedoko|jelavmedoko]] || [[word:shelavmedoko|shelavmedoko]] || [[word:kelavmedoko|kelavmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholavmedoko|thotholavmedoko]] || [[word:jojolavmedoko|jojolavmedoko]] || [[word:shosholavmedoko|shosholavmedoko]] || [[word:kokolavmedoko|kokolavmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholavmedoko|tholavmedoko]] || [[word:jolavmedoko|jolavmedoko]] || [[word:sholavmedoko|sholavmedoko]] || [[word:kolavmedoko|kolavmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholavmedoko|tholavmedoko]] || [[word:jolavmedoko|jolavmedoko]] || [[word:sholavmedoko|sholavmedoko]] || [[word:kolavmedoko|kolavmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlavmedoko|thĂŠlavmedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlavmedoko|jĂŠlavmedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlavmedoko|shĂŠlavmedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlavmedoko|kĂŠlavmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalavmedoko|thathalavmedoko]] || [[word:jajalavmedoko|jajalavmedoko]] || [[word:shashalavmedoko|shashalavmedoko]] || [[word:kakalavmedoko|kakalavmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalavmedoko|thalavmedoko]] || [[word:jalavmedoko|jalavmedoko]] || [[word:shalavmedoko|shalavmedoko]] || [[word:kalavmedoko|kalavmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalavmedoko|thalavmedoko]] || [[word:jalavmedoko|jalavmedoko]] || [[word:shalavmedoko|shalavmedoko]] || [[word:kalavmedoko|kalavmedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
